name: Runtime Truth Backbone + Dashboard Data Contract
principle: Dashboard surfaces render runtime truth only. Missing required truth is marked pending, blocked, failed, skipped_by_route, or not_applicable; it is never inferred as completed.

lifecycle_stages.name: Signal Ingestion
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Capture raw signals from approved live/local sources.

lifecycle_stages.name: Signal Normalization
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Normalize incoming signals into a consistent runtime format.

lifecycle_stages.name: Source Validation & Weighting
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Validate source quality, freshness, trust weight, and usefulness.

lifecycle_stages.name: Context Expansion
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Expand signal context using related sources, entities, and prior verified outputs.

lifecycle_stages.name: Signal Consolidation
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Consolidate duplicate/conflicting signals into governed evidence baskets.

lifecycle_stages.name: Entity Extraction
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Extract organizations, technologies, markets, people, assets, risks, and constraints.

lifecycle_stages.name: Relationship Mapping
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Map relationships among entities, evidence, opportunities, constraints, and routes.

lifecycle_stages.name: Trend Discovery
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Detect emerging trends, weak signals, clusters, anomalies, and market movement.

lifecycle_stages.name: Cluster Formation
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Form durable clusters from related signals, entities, and evidence.

lifecycle_stages.name: Insight / Thesis Structuring + Route Gate
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Structure the thesis and select the route or terminal failure state.

lifecycle_stages.name: Gap Detection
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Identify market, technical, operational, portfolio, regulatory, or system gaps.

lifecycle_stages.name: Gap Qualification
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Determine whether the gap is meaningful, material, and route-worthy.

lifecycle_stages.name: Discovery Generation
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Generate a qualified discovery from the gap/evidence structure.

lifecycle_stages.name: Breakthrough Identification / Classification
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Classify whether the discovery is a qualified breakthrough.

lifecycle_stages.name: Advancement Path Selection
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Select the correct advancement path: portfolio, design, system, acquisition, or other.

lifecycle_stages.name: Auto Invention / Solution Generation
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Generate candidate solution concepts under governed constraints.

lifecycle_stages.name: Solution Structuring
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Structure the selected solution into components, dependencies, and specifications.

lifecycle_stages.name: Buildability Assessment
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Assess engineering, software, operational, or construction buildability.

lifecycle_stages.name: Viability Assessment
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Assess market, economic, revenue, adoption, and strategic viability.

lifecycle_stages.name: Manufacturability / Deployability Assessment
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Assess production, deployment, scaling, integration, and operations readiness.

lifecycle_stages.name: Feasibility Validation
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Validate feasibility across buildability, viability, deployment, risk, and evidence.

lifecycle_stages.name: Design Portal Output / Blueprints / Specs
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Produce blueprint, spec, architecture, component map, and design portal output.

lifecycle_stages.name: Market Positioning
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Position the thesis, product, portfolio, system, or package in the market.

lifecycle_stages.name: Moat & Differentiation
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Analyze defensibility, differentiation, uniqueness, and compounding advantage.

lifecycle_stages.name: Business Model & Value Capture
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Define business model, monetization, distribution, and value capture.

lifecycle_stages.name: Competitor Analysis
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Assess competitors, substitutes, comparative weaknesses, and opportunity wedges.

lifecycle_stages.name: Portfolio Creation / Optimization
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Create or optimize the portfolio action, allocation, watchlist, or thesis basket.

lifecycle_stages.name: Acquirer Identification
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Identify likely acquirers, strategic buyers, partners, or enterprise owners.

lifecycle_stages.name: Acquisition Fit & Rationale
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Explain fit, synergies, integration logic, and acquisition rationale.

lifecycle_stages.name: Final Package Construction
lifecycle_stages.purpose: Construct the final package, export, memo, design pack, or acquisition-ready output.

memory_rule: No validation pass -> no verified memory -> no recursive feedback.
